nasb.text: And He will arise and shepherd His flock In the strength of the Lord, In the majesty of the name of the Lord His God. And they will remain, Because at that time He will be great To the ends of the earth.

esv.text: And he shall stand and shepherd his flock in the strength of the Lord, in the majesty of the name of the Lord his God. And they shall dwell secure, for now he shall be great to the ends of the earth.

cnv.text: 他必站立起來， 靠著耶和華的能力， 靠著耶和華他　神之名的威嚴， 牧養他的羊群； 他們必然安居， 因為那時他必尊大， 直到地極。

ccb.text: 祂要挺身而起， 倚靠耶和华的能力， 奉祂上帝耶和华的威名牧养祂的群羊。 他们将安然居住， 因为那时祂必受尊崇，直达地极。
